overall.description: A first-person drive through an industrial complex in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera approaches a large facility with red structural beams, passes through a covered corridor beneath overhead pipes and machinery, and emerges into an open wasteland with distant industrial towers visible on the horizon. The scene features high-quality rendered graphics with warm desert lighting.

large industrial structure with red steel support beams and gray paneled walls
security fence running parallel to the road on the left side

derelict vehicle sitting on the left side of the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide industrial access road under clear blue skies. A large cooling tower emits steam in the distance to the left, while a massive building with distinctive red structural beams dominates the right side. The camera drives forward past a chain-link fence and an abandoned vehicle, approaching an overhead industrial walkway that marks the entrance to a covered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered transport corridor beneath industrial facility

events.description: passing deeper into the covered section where artificial ceiling lights become the primary illumination

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the dimly lit industrial corridor beneath the facility

entered.detail: large red and gray industrial pipes running along the ceiling of the corridor
fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling providing artificial illumination
large cylindrical industrial storage tanks visible on the right side of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera drives through a long covered corridor beneath the industrial facility, transitioning from natural to mixed artificial lighting. Overhead pipes and fluorescent lights line the ceiling, while large industrial tanks stand to the right. The red steel building remains visible on the left side as the camera progresses steadily through the sheltered passageway toward the distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial wasteland with distant skyline

events.description: exiting the covered structure into bright open landscape with distant industrial skyline visible
road curves gently to the right as the vehicle continues forward

agents.ego_description: exiting the facility and driving into open terrain with distant industrial structures visible ahead

entered.detail: tall industrial towers and refinery structures visible on the horizon against the sky
hazy mountain range visible in the far distance to the right

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered corridor back into bright daylight, revealing an expansive industrial wasteland. The distant skyline features numerous tall towers and refinery structures, with mountains visible on the right horizon. The road curves gently to the right as the vehicle continues through the open desert landscape, leaving the facility behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a bright industrial access road through a sheltered facility corridor and out into an expansive desert wasteland. It begins on an open road under clear blue skies, passing a steaming cooling tower and a massive building with red structural beams before approaching an overhead walkway. As the camera enters the covered corridor, the natural light shifts to a mix of artificial fluorescent glows, guiding the view past overhead pipes and large industrial tanks. The scene then opens back into bright daylight as the camera emerges from the passageway, revealing a vast wasteland dominated by distant refinery towers and mountains. Finally, the road curves gently to the right, leaving the industrial complex behind as the vehicle moves deeper into the open landscape.
